programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: At The Royal Melbourne Hospital, Drs Michael Dunne and Jonathan Papson urgently need answers for one of the sickest patients they’ve seen. Dr Michelle Thornhill examines a teenager in agony after he fell onto back while riding a dirt bike.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: At The Royal Melbourne Hospital’s Emergency Department, doctors Tinnie Chang and Caitlin Young fear a cyclist has life-changing injuries. Dr Emma West suspects a happy man is hiding his injuries after a motorbike crash, but scans don’t lie.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
